title: Whisky/Whiskey Sipping Stones Gift Set of 9 Natural Soapstone and Granite Chilling Rocks with Stylish Box and Free Velvet Pouch (9pc Stainless Steel)
features: Granite Whiskey / Whisky Stones, 9 pieces, Enjoy your Drink with Premium Whiskey Rocks, instead of Ice, which dilutes your Beverage
Comes with a Gift box and Velvet bag required for storage to cool your whiskey rocks in the freezer
Ideal for Gifts for BIRTHDAY'S, CHRISTMAS, FATHER DAY and other important Occasions
Each Whiskey Stone is approximately 2cm, ideally place three Rocks per Beverage or more to cool your drink further.
description: Premium Whiskey Stones Gift Set There's nothing better than a cool, refreshing drink on a hot summer's day. But there has always been one glaring problem with using ice cubes to chill your beverages: as they melt, they dilute the drink they're in, greatly affecting its flavour. The solution to this issue is clear - Whisky Stones! Simple and Straightforward to Use Using these reusable ice cube alternatives couldn't be easier. Place them in your freezer for 2 - 4 hours and once they're chilled to your satisfaction, simply take them out and put them in your drink! A Smoother and More Palatable Drinking Experience Made out of premium quality granite, these artificial ice cubes are specifically designed to remain cold for hours, without the risk that they will melt and dilute your drink. This means you can keep your drink cooler for longer than ever before, whilst simultaneously preserving its flavour! Though you'll see best results with alcohols such as whiskey and gin, these synthetic ice cubes are just as good when it comes to soft drinks, fruit juice, or any other drink you could care to name! Ensuring a great-tasting, cooler drink for longer, these whisky stones are a must-have purchase for anyone tired of drinking watered down beverages.
